title: Toiletry Bag for Men Large Travel Wash Bag Water-Resistant Gym Shaving Organiser Bag, Shower Bathroom Makeup Bag with Handle (Black)
features: Premium Material - The travel toiletry bag is made of water-resistant 600D oxford material, wear-resistant, easy to wipe clean. Smooth nylon and PU lining prevents moisture from infiltrating into the material, keeping the various components dry and prolonging the service life.

Roomy Capacity Toiletry Bag - Dimension: 26*10*15cm (10.23*3.94*5.91inches). 1 capacious main compartment to hold all your toiletries and shaving supplies organized. There is a zippered pocket on the side to store smaller toiletries and cosmetics, quick access.

Easy to carry - The side handle make the travel wash bag easy to carry. When you are on a business trip or traveling, you can put your toiletry bag in your backpack or suitcase. It can also be hung up for quick and easy access to toiletries.
Multi-purpose Toiletry Organizer - Can be used as a wash bag, cosmetic bag, shower bag, makeup bag, shaving bag and gym bag. Suitable for men's and women's daily and travel use.
Perfect Gift - Our toiletry bag is a perfect choice to put in your suitcase on any business or family trip, camping, beach or gym. Can be a good gift for husband, boyfriend and friends.
description: Product Description Made from water resistant and durable, high-quality polyester This bag is large enough to hold toiletries and other travel essentials, spacious main compartment that is both long and deep. The travel toiletry bag is suitable for all ages, men, and women. A must-have for all travelers and an ideal gift for your family and friends. Wipeable interior make you don't worrying about damage to the material. bring this travel toiletry bag into wet spaces and bathrooms. Product specifications Size: 10.23 x 3.94 x 5.91 inch Weight: 130g Our toiletry bag is perfect for travel, business trip, overnight camping, gym shower, and outdoor activities, or just useful stuff organizer for home, bathroom, college dorm, or daily storage.
